prestazioni: Engine: XU10J4RS (2.0L 16V, 167 PS stock) – Full forged internals build with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (87.5mm, 11.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Upgraded to a steel billet crankshaft from Manley Performance for 8,500 RPM reliability.

Forced Induction: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Janspeed Engineering. Paired with a GReddy Type-S intercooler (400x160x65mm core) and a Pierburg 80mm throttle body for optimized airflow.

Fuel & Ignition: Bosch Motorsport 0280158002 high-flow injectors (360cc/min) with a Walbro 255 LPH in-tank fuel pump. Standalone ECU: Link G4+ Xtreme with custom XU10J4RS base map, running MSD 8mm ignition wires and NGK Iridium IX (BKR7EIX) spark plugs gapped at 0.8mm.
estetica: Body Kit: OMP Peugeot 306 S16 Group A WRC replica widebody kit (fiberglass, bolt-on fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser) with custom carbon fiber hood (3.5kg weight reduction) from Seibon Carbon.

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (adjustable damping, 30-way rebound, 12-way compression) with Eibach Pro-Spacer 20mm wheel spacers (5x108 PCD) and polybushings from SuperPro (front control arms, rear trailing arms).

Wheels & Brakes: BBS CH-R II 17x8.5 ET20 wheels (5x108, 7.5kg each) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (225/40/17). Front: AP Racing 4-piston calipers with 300mm slotted rotors; Rear: Brembo GT 2-piston calipers with 280mm rotors, braided lines by Goodridge.
